Total Recordable Incident Rate (TRIR) is calculated as follows:\n
\n(total number of recordable incidents x 200,000) ÷ total number of hours worked by all employees

What is your company's 3 year average TRIR for the past year? Value must be in decimal format e.g. 2.85
